limitations_remaining: global anchor coupling across centers (closed in v0.4.1)
in-episode aggregation: one delta_X per (center, episode)
Z_norm is not a reliable discrimination axis (use AR / kappa)
directed interactions inter-center not wired in observer (Etapa 3 / v0.5.0)
R0-R11 not reproduced explicitly in integrated runtime (Etapa 2 / v0.4.2)
notes: ETAPA 0 baseline lock. Confirms 213 passing pre-v0.4.1. Manifest hand-written: stage_finalize re-runs pytest against the current tree, which post-dates the baseline. pytest_summary.txt is the actual baseline snapshot showing '213 passed'. Going forward stage_finalize is the source of truth at the END of each stage; only ETAPA 0 needed this retroactive correction.
